<!-- Copyright © 2023-2026 ValidMind Inc. All rights reserved.
Refer to the LICENSE file in the root of this repository for details.
SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0 AND ValidMind Commercial -->

The {{< var vm.product >}} MCP (Model Context Protocol) server enables AI assistants like Claude Desktop and Cursor to query and manage your model inventory through natural language, providing seamless access to models, artifacts, templates, and custom fields.
